action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start, no code yet. Analysis: Need to build an image-to-LaTeX model for CROHME 2019. I'll use a DenseNet-121 encoder (pretrained) with an attention-based GRU decoder. Decision: First, explore data structure, then build model, training script, and predict script. Train for a few epochs to get baseline.
